title: VShowModel Method, Spel Class
syntax: Sub VShowModel (Sequence As String, Object As String, Parent As Form)
parameters:
Sequence	String expression
		 containing the name of a vision sequence in the current EPSON
		 RC+ project.

Object	String expression
		 containing the name of a vision object in the current EPSON RC+
		 project.
description: Display the object model. For more details, see the ShowModel Property in the Vision Guide Properties reference.
